hero_title: One API for Hundreds of AI Models Worldwide
hero_subtitle: OpenAI compatible format. Quickly connect to GPT-4o, Claude, DeepSeek, Gemini, and more. Pay as you go, start with zero threshold.
feat_subtitle: The Next-Generation Lightning Fast AI Model Gateway for Developers and Enterprises
feat1_desc: OpenAI compatible API format. Just change the Base URL and Key to seamlessly switch to hundreds of mainstream models with zero code cost.
feat2_desc: Aggregating model matrices from dozens of top providers like OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, DeepSeek, ByteDance, etc.
feat3_desc: Global edge node routing. Supports automatic hitless disaster recovery retries during high load or failure of main channels.
feat4_desc: Supports IP whitelist protection, end-to-end high-strength encryption, and Base64 data privacy masking for logs.
qnav1_desc: View all AI models on the platform, covering text, image, video, voice, and more
qnav2_desc: Technical support, business cooperation, custom requirements
qnav3_desc: Learn about our team vision and technical strength
cta_description: Get your API key in just 3 minutes and start innovating. Base URL: https://api.artsapi.com/api, seamless migration with zero cost.
about_hero_subtitle: As an industry-leading AI model aggregation platform, we eliminate vendor lock-in risks. With better pricing, high availability, and enterprise-grade stability, we bridge your access to the world's most advanced large language models.
about_press_desc: Aims to be the preferred aggregation gateway for developers to connect, compare, and call different AI models. Connect once to access hundreds of frontier models.
about_cta_desc_prefix: Join tens of thousands of developers and leverage
